name: CodeGen 16B (Mono)
archDisplay: Dense autoregressive transformer (GPT-2-style), 16.1B params, trained on TPU-v4
note: Early open program-synthesis LLM (350M-16B) trained on TPU-v4; Mono variant was competitive with OpenAI Codex on HumanEval

results.notes: pass@1 on sanitized MBPP (n=100, temperature=0.8), CodeGen-Mono 16.1B, Table 11 of the CodeGen paper (arXiv 2203.13474)

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: arxiv 2203.13474 (v1 submitted 2022-03-25) and HF repo Salesforce/codegen-16B-mono exist. Fetched ar5iv paper directly and confirmed Table 1 literally shows CodeGen-Mono 16.1B pass@1 = 29.28 on HumanEval. License BSD-3-Clause confirmed via HF/search.
